SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARAMES, KEITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IVIE, COLLEEN FRIENDS OF SCHOOL OF THE ARTS (FOSOTA) NO STATEMENT CONTAINED IN THE LETTER DATED OCTOBER 4, 2013 AUTHORED BY MS. COLLEEN IVIE, CONSTITUTES DEFAMATION BY THE DEFENDANTS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF, MR. KEITH CARAMES. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
